mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_num, wo.order_id AS work_order_id, wo.plan_num, wo.order_qty AS order_qty, pp.plan_qty, pp.plan_id, CASE WHEN pp.plan_status IN ('취소', '완료') THEN pp.plan_status WHEN pp.plan_status = '진행' THEN '진행' WHEN SYSDATE >= pp.plan_start THEN '진행' ELSE '대기' END AS plan_status, pp.plan_start, pp.plan_end, pp.item_num, wo.order_status AS work_status, wo.emp_num, wo.current_qty, NVL(wo.input_qty, 0) AS input_qty, wo.product_lot_num, wo.content, wo.created_at, wo.order_start, wo.order_end, wo.worker_num, e.ename, w.ename AS worker_ename, i.name AS item_name, i.code, i.type, f.facility_num, f.facility_name FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN emp e ON wo.emp_num = e.emp_num LEFT JOIN emp w ON wo.worker_num = w.emp_num LEFT JOIN production_plan pp ON wo.plan_num = pp.plan_num LEFT JOIN item i ON pp.item_num = i.item_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_num, facility_num FROM ( SELECT item_num, facility_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_num ORDER BY flow) AS rn FROM process WHERE facility_num IS NOT NULL ) WHERE rn = 1 ) pr ON i.item_num = pr.item_num LEFT JOIN facility f ON pr.facility_num = f.facility_num WHERE wo.order_id = #{work_order_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'WO-' || REPLACE(pp.plan_id, '-', '') || '-' || LPAD( (SELECT NVL(MAX( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(wo.order_id, '^WO-' || REPLACE(pp.plan_id, '-', '') || '-[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(wo.order_id, '[0-9]+$')) ELSE 0 END ), 0) + 1 FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.plan_num = #{plan_num}), 3, '0' ) FROM production_plan pp WHERE pp.plan_num = #{plan_num}
INSERT INTO work_order (order_num, order_id, order_qty, order_status, emp_num, worker_num, plan_num, current_qty, content, created_at, order_start) SELECT WO_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{work_order_id}, #{order_qty}, '대기', #{emp_num}, #{worker_num}, #{plan_num}, 0, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{order_start} FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM production_plan WHERE plan_num = #{plan_num} AND (plan_status IN ('취소', '완료') OR SYSDATE > plan_end) )
mapper.select: SELECT item_num AS num, name || CASE WHEN item_status = 'N' THEN ' (기능중단)' ELSE '' END AS name, type AS type FROM item WHERE type IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY type, name
SELECT emp_num AS num, ename AS name FROM emp WHERE status = 'N' ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT emp_num AS num, ename AS name FROM emp WHERE e_level = 1 AND status = 'Y' ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT emp_num FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}
SELECT worker_num FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}
SELECT plan_num AS num, plan_id AS name FROM production_plan WHERE plan_status != '취소' ORDER BY plan_num
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET order_status = #{work_status}, order_end = CASE WHEN #{work_status} IN ('대기', '취소') THEN NULL ELSE order_end END WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id} AND order_status NOT IN ('완료', '취소')

UPDATE work_order SET current_qty = current_qty + #{qty}, order_status = CASE WHEN current_qty + #{qty} >= order_qty THEN '완료' ELSE order_status END, order_end = CASE WHEN current_qty + #{qty} >= order_qty THEN SYSDATE ELSE order_end END WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id} AND order_status != '완료' AND order_status != '취소'

UPDATE production_plan SET plan_status = '완료' WHERE plan_num = ( SELECT plan_num FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{value} ) AND plan_status NOT IN ('취소', '완료') AND plan_qty <= ( SELECT NVL(SUM(wo.current_qty), 0) FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.plan_num = production_plan.plan_num )
mapper.select: SELECT item_num2, required_qty FROM bom WHERE item_num = #{item_num} AND bom_status = 'Y'
SELECT b.item_num2, b.required_qty, i.name, i.code FROM bom b JOIN item i ON b.item_num2 = i.item_num WHERE b.item_num = #{item_num} AND b.bom_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO io (io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason) VALUES (IO_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ioType}, #{ioQty}, SYSDATE, #{qcNum}, #{lotNum}, #{ioReason})

INSERT INTO io ( io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked ) VALUES ( IO_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '입고', #{ioQty}, SYSDATE, ( SELECT MIN(qc_num) FROM qc WHERE qc_type = #{itemType} AND qc_pass = 'WAITING' ), #{lotNum}, '생산입고', 3, #{empNum}, 'N' )
INSERT INTO order_lot (order_lot_num, order_num, lot_num, qty) VALUES (ORDER_LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{order_num}, #{lot_num}, #{qty})
mapper.select: SELECT ol.order_lot_num, ol.lot_num, ol.qty, l.lot_code, i.name AS item_name, TO_CHAR(l.lot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lot_date, TO_CHAR(l.expiry_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expiry_date FROM order_lot ol JOIN lot l ON ol.lot_num = l.lot_num JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num WHERE ol.order_num = #{order_num} ORDER BY l.lot_date ASC, ol.order_lot_num ASC
SELECT ol.order_lot_num, ol.lot_num, ol.qty, l.item_num FROM order_lot ol JOIN lot l ON ol.lot_num = l.lot_num WHERE ol.order_num = #{order_num} ORDER BY l.lot_date DESC, ol.order_lot_num DESC

SELECT process_num AS PROCESS_NUM, flow AS FLOW, process_content AS PROCESS_CONTENT, process_status AS PROCESS_STATUS FROM process WHERE item_num = #{_parameter} AND process_status = '사용중' ORDER BY flow ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_process WHERE order_num = #{order_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_process (work_process_num, order_num, process_num, flow, status) VALUES (WORK_PROCESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{order_num}, #{process_num}, #{flow}, '대기')
mapper.select: SELECT wp.work_process_num, wp.order_num, wp.process_num, wp.flow, wp.status, TO_CHAR(wp.start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS start_time, TO_CHAR(wp.end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS end_time, p.process_content, f.facility_name FROM work_process wp LEFT JOIN process p ON wp.process_num = p.process_num LEFT JOIN facility f ON p.facility_num = f.facility_num WHERE wp.order_num = #{order_num} ORDER BY wp.flow ASC, wp.work_process_num ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE work_process SET status = #{status}, start_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = '진행' THEN SYSDATE ELSE start_time END, end_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = '완료' THEN SYSDATE ELSE end_time END WHERE order_num = #{order_num} AND process_num = #{process_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_process_lot (wp_lot_num, work_process_num, lot_num, item_num, qty) VALUES (WORK_PROCESS_LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{work_process_num}, #{lot_num}, #{item_num}, #{qty})
mapper.select: SELECT wpl.wp_lot_num, wpl.work_process_num, wpl.lot_num, wpl.item_num, wpl.qty, l.lot_code, i.name AS item_name, wp.flow FROM work_process_lot wpl JOIN work_process wp ON wpl.work_process_num = wp.work_process_num JOIN lot l ON wpl.lot_num = l.lot_num JOIN item i ON wpl.item_num = i.item_num WHERE wp.order_num = #{order_num} ORDER BY wp.flow ASC, wpl.wp_lot_num ASC
SELECT b.item_num2, b.required_qty, i.name, i.code FROM bom b JOIN item i ON b.item_num2 = i.item_num WHERE b.process_num = #{process_num} AND b.bom_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO lot (lot_num, lot_code, item_num, order_num, init_qty, current_qty, lot_date, expiry_date) VALUES ( #{lot_num}, 'LOT-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || #{lot_num}, #{item_num}, #{order_num}, NULL, 0, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{type} = 'SEMIPRODUCT' THEN SYSDATE + 10 ELSE SYSDATE + 20 END )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET product_lot_num = #{lot_num} WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}
UPDATE work_order SET input_qty = #{qty} WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}
UPDATE work_order SET current_qty = #{qty} WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_process WHERE order_num = #{order_num} AND status = '진행'
